reasoning: Emotional (60%): Bright saturated cyan-blue reads as a classic Zelda treasure gem — cheerful, warm, toy-diorama friendly. Rounded oval silhouette is approachable and charming, not threatening. Saturation is strong and fits the Hyrule palette brief. Score ~8/10 emotionally. Technical (40%): 1px hard black outline is consistent around the full perimeter with no visible anti-aliasing. Palette is tightly constrained to 3 tones: sky-blue base, darker blue shadow band at bottom, and crisp white highlights at upper-center. All pixels snap cleanly to the grid at every zoom level. Shading is hard/flat with no gradients. Matches Denzi-style hard-outline, limited-palette execution seen in reference sheet. Score ~8/10 technically. Weighted total ~8. No blocking issues found.
